title: Charge Qubits: The Original Superconducting Qubit
description: Learn about charge qubits (Cooper pair boxes) - the first superconducting qubits. Understand charge quantization, the charging energy regime, and why charge noise led to the development of the transmon.
learningObjectives: Explain the physics of charge quantization in superconducting islands
Derive the Cooper pair box Hamiltonian and energy spectrum
Calculate charge dispersion and its effect on coherence
Understand the charge degeneracy point and its role as a sweet spot
Compare charge qubit evolution from CPB to quantronium to transmon
